title: El Presente de Subjuntivo: Formation
summary: How to build the present subjunctive for every verb type: the flip-the-vowel rule from a verb's own present-indicative yo-form, stem-changing and yo-irregular subjunctives inherited directly from Chapter 23, the -car/-gar/-zar spelling swaps now spread across all six persons, and the five true irregulars (ser, estar, ir, dar, saber).
